description: COLES CAT LITTER TRAY 1PACK
long_description:
Coles Cat Litter Tray.


  • Suitable for cats of all sizes
  • Durable plastic
  • Easy to clean


Coles Cat Litter Tray is perfect for feline friends of all sizes. It's made from durable plastic and is easy for your pet to get in and out of while keeping the litter contained. Coles Cat Litter Tray is easy to clean and hand washable to keep it fresh. It's also suitable for all types of cat litter. When it comes to choosing the perfect cat litter for your pet, make sure it's safe first and foremost and doesn't include a lot of fragrance which can be toxic or lead to sinus or respiratory problems.


Whether your pet prefers cat litter crystals, or clumping or non-clumping varieties, Coles Cat Litter Tray is the ideal base. Place it in a convenient location where it won't get disturbed, away from food and water bowls. Fill Coles Cat Litter Tray approximately half full and maintain freshness by following the instructions on your chosen litter bag.

description: BREEDER'S CHOICE PLUS PROBIOTIC CAT LITTER 20L
long_description:
Biodegradable & Compostable**
**Remove Waste - Check with local council

Natural probiotics feed off the bacteria in your litter tray to help eliminate bad smells.

Breeder's Choice Plus Probiotics combines your favourite cat litter with naturally occurring probiotics that feed on the bacteria in litter trays to help eliminate bad smells, keeping the litter tray and your home smelling clean and fresh. It is a natural and non-toxic method to deliver brilliant odour control.
For over 30 years, Breeder's Choice has been providing Australian homes with 99% recycled paper cat litter that is free from nasty chemicals and additives. Proudly made in Regional Australia, Breeder's Choice Plus Probiotics is made from recycled paper, water, air and natural probiotics, so it's soft and safe for all paws.
Breeder's Choice Plus Cat Litter can be composted once the waste is removed, but we recommend that you check with your local council for guidelines.

description: MAX'S CAT LITTER 4KG
long_description:
Meet Max. He saunters, he sunbathes and whenever he wants something, Max just swirls around his owner's ankles and emits a dainty meow. Mixed-breed rescue-cat origins aside, Max knows he's a king - there are no issues around self-worth here.

And not to put too fine a point on it, Max also appreciates a darned good loo. Which is why Max's Cat Litter has to be all-natural, unscented and satisfying to dig in. The fact that it's easy to handle, biodegradable and made from upcycled rice hulls is a bonus.

Max's Cat Litter. Cat approved.
  • Highly Absorbent: The special mix of rice hulls with a dash of bentonite means Max's cat litter is super absorbent and soaks up wees fast.

  • Natural & Non-Toxic: As easy on your cat's feet as it is on the planet, Max's Cat Litter is made from 100% natural products.

  • Biodegradable: Based on upcycled rice hulls which Max's Cat Litter is biodegradable.
ingredients: Rice hulls, rice pollard, bentonite

long_description:
TEMPTATIONS cat treats are the great tasting treats cats can't resist. Crunchy on the outside and soft on the inside. All It Takes Is A Shake and your cat will come running. They come in a handy resealable pack for freshness and in a variety of delicious flavours that your cat will adore! Nutritionally balanced, you can feed up to 17 treats for a 4.5kg adult cat daily as a treat or snack. If fed as a main meal, feed 50 grams to a 4.5kg adult cat per day.

TEMPTATIONS Treats provides a complete diet for adult cats. It meets the nutritional levels as established by the Association of American Feed Control Officials (AAFCO) Nutrition Profile for adult cat maintenance.
  • Under 2 calories per treat

  • High in Protein

  • 100% Complete and Balanced Diet for Adult Cats

  • Vitamins & Minerals

  • Soft inside, Crunchy outside

  • Resealable Packaging for Freshness.

long_description:
Welcome to Applaws. The home of adventurous minds and even more adventurous appetites. We have a new look, but our cat food is still as naturally delicious as ever, with the same great taste that your cats will love. We craft every recipe to excite your cat's appetite and taste for adventure so there's always a new dish for them to discover. A happy and healthy cat starts with food made from the highest quality ingredients, we only put in the good stuff! Deliciously natural, our food is free from artificial preservatives, colours, and flavours and all recipes are made with 100% natural, limited ingredients. With high quality protein always the first ingredient, your cat's natural cravings will be met!As we transition to our new look, the packaging you will receive may vary. However, the naturally tasty recipes remain the same.
  • Limited, Nourishing Ingredients: Limited ingredient food your cat will love.

long_description:
Introducing the PURINA TOTALCARE Cat Treat Ball, an interactive toy designed to keep your cat entertained while promoting healthy physical activity. Simply fill the ball with your cat's favourite treats, and watch as they eagerly chase and bat at it, enjoying the challenge of earning their rewards.


This engaging toy not only entertains but also stimulates your cat's cognitive abilities by encouraging problem-solving skills. As they figure out how to manoeuvre the ball to release treats, they sharpen their mental agility.


The PURINA TOTALCARE Cat Treat Ball also promotes reflexes and alertness, ensuring your cat stays active and fit.


Reduce boredom and enhance your cat's playtime experience with this rewarding treat-dispensing ball. Elevate their physical and mental well-being with the PURINA TOTALCARE Cat Treat Ball—where playtime meets healthy living!


How to use:
1. Rotate the top of the ball until the large opening is visible, and insert treats
2. Rotate the top until it aligns with the small opening
3. As the ball is played with, treats will fall out
4. Rotate the top to the closed position to use as a play ball


Wash and dry well after use
Treats not included

description: EXELPET VET SERIES SPOT ON ALL WORMER TREATMENT CAT 2PACK
long_description:
The EXELPET brand is a well-recognised and trusted pet health care brand that has been helping to protect Australian dogs and cats from parasites since 1972. Parasites such as fleas, intestinal worms and heartworm pose a challenge to most Australian pets. Your pet is an important part of your life and looking after their day to day health is a big priority. EXELPET products offer a comprehensive range of convenient and effective solutions designed to eliminate and prevent fleas, intestinal worms and heartworm.

Intestinal worms affect thousands of Australian pets every year. Untreated, intestinal worms present a significant health risk to you and your pet. The good news is that keeping your pets free from intestinal parasites is easy. EXELPET worming products provide broad spectrum and simple to use treatment from intestinal parasites for your pet. Intestinal worming is recommended at least 3 monthly in your adult pet. Pets fed or potentially able to access offal require intestinal worming every 6 weeks.

EXELPET Vet Series Spot-On All-Wormer for cats.
name: Vet Series Spot On All Wormer Treatment Cat

TOTALCARE Heartwormer, Allwormer & Flea Control prevents heartworm infection, treats roundworm, whipworm, hookworm and tapeworm, prevents and controls fleas long-term and controls flea allergy dermatitis. Got a question? Why not contact the Purina PetCare Advice Team, free call on 1800 738 23

ingredients: 120 g/L (S)-Methoprene, 100 g/L Fipronil
long_description:
PURINA TOTAL CARE Flea & Tick Control Plus for Cats & Kittens kills onset and re-infestations with newly acquired adult fleas for one month. It also prevents the development of flea eggs, larvae and pupae produced by adult fleas acquired for six weeks after treatment. It may be used for the treatment and control of Flea Allergy Dermatitis in cats. It may be used as the only product for flea control as it breaks the life cycle on the animal and in its surroundings by killing all stages of fleas.

Units in pack: 1 x 0.50 mL Tube

Dosage: Once a month

Suitable for: Cats and kittens

Not recommended for: Kittens less than 8 weeks old
  • Kills all flea stages for at least 1 month, including fleas in the pet's surroundings

  • Prevents and controls flea re-infestation

  • Treats and controls flea allergy dermatitis

  • Controls biting lice

  • Fast acting and long lasting

  • Convenient to use.

  • Water fast.
name: Total Care Flea Control Plus Cat Treatment

description: EXELPET VET SERIES SPOT ON FLEA TREATMENT CAT KITTEN 2PACK
long_description:
The EXELPET brand is a well-recognised and trusted pet health care brand that has been helping to protect Australian dogs and cats from parasites since 1972. Parasites such as fleas, intestinal worms and heartworm pose a challenge to most Australian pets. Your pet is an important part of your life and looking after their day to day health is a big priority. EXELPET products offer a comprehensive range of convenient and effective solutions designed to eliminate and prevent fleas, intestinal worms and heartworm.

The key to effective flea control is starting early, before adult numbers build up. For effective control, we recommend using EXELPET flea prevention regularly, all year round. Some products will kill adult fleas, while some prevent the development of larvae or the production of viable flea eggs. EXELPET products provide a comprehensive range of solutions to help provide protection from all four stages of the flea lifecycle.

Because most of a flea's life is spent in the environment and not on your pet, good flea management programs also involve attending to your dog or cat's environment. Washing bedding, blankets and pillows in hot water (>60C) as well as cleaning up or fencing off dusty or sandy areas outdoors where your pet spends time.

EXELPET Spot-On Flea Treatment for Cats
  • FOR THE TREATMENT AND PREVENTION OF FLEA INFESTATIONS AND CONTROL OF FLEA ALLERGY DERMATITIS ON CATS AND KITTENS

  • EFFECTIVE FOR 1 MONTH
name: Vet Series Spot On Flea Treatment Cat Kitten

name: Puppy With Chicken Dry Dog Food
description: SUPERCOAT SMARTBLEND PUPPY DRY DOG FOOD 2.6KG
long_description:
Using a scientifically developed blend of highquality natural ingredients, SUPERCOAT SMARTBLEND Puppy Dog Food With Chicken combines real chicken with 22 essential vitamins and minerals to deliver targeted nutrition that fuels healthy development from the inside out.

Every puppy has unique nutritional needs, especially during their early months when their bodies and minds are rapidly developing. That's why the experts at SUPERCOAT created SMARTBLEND - a precise combination of purposeful ingredients chosen for their ability to support your puppy's overall health and wellbeing. Each component works together to provide energy, support immunity, strengthen bones, and encourage healthy cognitive development. With every meal, your puppy receives the tailored nourishment they need to bring out their best every day.

SUPERCOAT SMARTBLEND recipes are carefully tailored to suit your dog's life stage, ensuring that puppies receive the right balance of nutrients to support their rapid growth. This formula is proudly made in Australia, using trusted, quality ingredients with no added artificial colours or flavours, giving your puppy wholesome nutrition you can feel confident about.

A key benefit of this recipe is its Tailored Energy for Growth. Puppies require higher levels of protein and fat to support their active lifestyles and developing bodies. This formula delivers those elevated energy levels, helping your puppy build strong muscles and maintain healthy activity throughout the day. Real chicken provides a highquality protein source that supports lean muscle development while offering a taste puppies love.

To help protect your puppy as they explore the world, the formula includes a Natural Defence blend of essential vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. These nutrients work together to support your puppy's natural immune system, helping them stay healthy and resilient during their early growth stages.

Strong skeletal development is also essential for growing puppies. That's why this recipe includes added calcium and vitamin D, supporting the formation of strong bones and healthy teeth. These nutrients play a vital role in helping your puppy develop a sturdy foundation that will support them throughout their adult life.

Cognitive and visual development are equally important during puppyhood. SUPERCOAT SMARTBLEND Puppy Dog Food includes DHA from fish, a key nutrient known to support healthy brain and vision development. This helps your puppy learn, respond, and interact with their environment as they grow.

With its thoughtful formulation and commitment to natural, highquality nutrition, SUPERCOAT SMARTBLEND Puppy Dog Food With Chicken provides everything your puppy needs to grow into a strong, healthy, and happy adult dog. It's complete, balanced, and designed to nourish your puppy at every stage of their early development.

  • - Brain & Vision Development- DHA from fish to help support your puppy's brain and vision development

  • - Strong Bones & Teeth - Added Calcium and Vitamin D to help maintain strong bones and teeth development

  • - Natural Defence - Essential vitamins, minerals and antioxidants to help support your puppy's natural defences

  • - Tailored Energy for Growth - High protein and fat levels to meet the energy needs of your growing puppy

  • - No added artificial colours or flavours

  • - Proudly made in Australia.
ingredients: Meat and meat by-products (chicken, beef) and poultry by-products; wholegrain wheat; wholegrain barley and sorghum and corn; cereal by-products and vegetable proteins; minerals, vitamins and amino acids (including calcium, phosphorus, sodium, chloride, potassium, manganese, zinc, iron, copper, iodine, vitamin A, vitamin E, vitamin B1, vitamin B2, vitamin B3, vitamin B5, vitamin B6, vitamin B12, vitamin D, choline & folic acid); fish oil.

long_description:
Discover Visible Health For Life with NEW PURINA ONE dry dog food. Advanced tailored nutrition for dogs, specially designed to help build the visible signs of health - today and for a lifetime.

PURINA ONE has been delivering accessible super premium nutrition since 1987, trusted by owners around the world. Combining years of pet care innovation from PURINA Veterinarians & Nutritional Scientists, PURINA ONE provides the high-quality nutrition your dog needs. And as their needs change, we have you covered, with formulas for different life stages and health needs.

All PURINA ONE dry dog products are specially formulated with prebiotic fibre to help support microflora balance. With the majority of the body's immune system located in the gut, a healthy gut microbiome helps promote optimal immune health, visibly improving their health from the inside out.

PURINA ONE Small Breed Dry Dog Food is specially formulated to deliver 100% complete & balanced nutrition for your adult dog.

Made in Australia, with real chicken as the #1 ingredient, and no added colours, artificial flavours, or preservatives, you can rest assured PURINA ONE dry dog food is both nutritious and delicious.

  • NUTRIENT DENSE & HIGHLY DIGESTIBLE - To ensure more nutrients are absorbed to help support healthy digestion and good health.

  • SUPPORTS STRONG MUSCLES & HEALTHY HEART - Protein from real chicken as the #1 ingredient, to help maintain and repair muscles.

  • MADE IN AUSTRALIA - With high-quality ingredients, ensuring a premium and reliable product..

name: Smartblend Adult Healthy Weight Dry Dog Food
description: SUPERCOAT SMARTBLEND ADULT HEALTHY WEIGHT DRY DOG FOOD 6.7KG
long_description:
Maintaining a healthy weight is essential for your dog's longterm wellbeing, and this formula has been thoughtfully developed by the experts at SUPERCOAT to support that goal. Using the SMARTBLEND approach, it combines highquality natural ingredients with real chicken and 22 essential vitamins and minerals to create a complete and balanced meal that nourishes your dog from the inside out. Every serving provides purposeful nutrition designed to help your dog feel satisfied, energised, and supported throughout their day.

With SUPERCOAT SMARTBLEND Adult Healthy Weight Dog Food With Chicken 6.7kg, you can be confident your dog is receiving nutrition tailored specifically to their life stage and weightmanagement needs. The SMARTBLEND philosophy focuses on selecting ingredients that work together in harmony, supporting your dog's overall health while helping them maintain a healthy body condition. Whether your dog is prone to weight gain, has a less active lifestyle, or simply benefits from a caloriecontrolled diet, this formula provides the right balance of nutrients to help them thrive.

A key feature of this recipe is its Calorie Controlled formulation. By offering an appropriate ratio of protein to fat, it helps maintain a healthy weight or support gradual, steady weight loss when needed. This ensures your dog receives essential nutrients without unnecessary calories, helping them stay lean, active, and comfortable. Real chicken provides a highquality protein source to support muscle maintenance, ensuring your dog retains strength even while managing their weight.

To help your dog feel fuller for longer, the formula is High in Fibre, making it easier to manage appetite and reduce overeating. This is especially beneficial for dogs who tend to beg for food or appear hungry between meals. The inclusion of natural fibre from wholegrain cereals also supports Healthy Digestion, promoting a smooth and efficient digestive process that contributes to overall comfort and wellbeing.

Supporting your dog's immune system is another important part of maintaining good health. That's why this recipe includes a Natural Defence blend of essential vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. These nutrients help strengthen your dog's natural immune responses, keeping them resilient and better equipped to handle everyday challenges.

SUPERCOAT is committed to providing wholesome, trustworthy nutrition. This formula contains no added artificial colours or flavours, ensuring your dog enjoys natural goodness in every bowl. It is also proudly made in Australia, using quality ingredients and local expertise to deliver a product you can rely on.

With its thoughtful formulation, natural ingredients, and targeted benefits, SUPERCOAT SMARTBLEND Adult Healthy Weight Dog Food With Chicken 6.7kg offers complete and balanced nutrition designed to support your dog's health, vitality, and ideal body condition. It's a smart, nourishing choice for dogs who need a little extra help maintaining a healthy weight while still enjoying a delicious, satisfying meal.

  • - Calorie Controlled- Appropriate protein and fat ratio to help maintain healthy weight or help promote weight loss

  • - High in Fibre - High in fibre to help your dog feel fuller for longer

  • - Healthy Digestion - Natural fibre from wholegrain cereal for a healthy digestive system

  • - Natural Defence - Essential vitamins, minerals and antioxidants to help support natural defences

  • - No added artificial colours or flavours

  • - Proudly made in Australia.
ingredients: Meat and meat by-products (chicken, beef) and poultry by-products; wholegrain wheat; wholegrain barley and sorghum and corn; cereal and plant by-products and vegetable proteins; minerals, vitamins and amino acids (including calcium, phosphorus, sodium, chloride, potassium, manganese, zinc, iron, copper, iodine, vitamin A, vitamin E, vitamin B1, vitamin B2, vitamin B3, vitamin B5, vitamin B6, vitamin B12, vitamin D, choline & folic acid).

And that's why the experts at SUPERCOAT developed SMARTBLEND, a precise combination of high-quality natural ingredients blended with real chicken, plus 22 essential vitamins and minerals. Nourish your dog with the tailored nutrition they need to bring out their best everyday.

Our SUPERCOAT SMARTBlend recipes are specially tailored to suit your dog's life stage and specific needs, so you can be sure they're getting the right nourishment to support overall health and wellbeing.
  • - Brain & Vision Development- DHA from fish to help support your puppy's brain and vision development

  • - Strong Bones & Teeth - Added Calcium and Vitamin D to help maintain strong bones and teeth development

  • - Natural Defence - Essential vitamins, minerals and antioxidants to help support your puppy's natural defences

  • - Tailored Energy for Growth - High protein and fat levels to meet the energy needs of your growing puppy

  • - No added artificial colours or flavours

  • - Proudly made in Australia.
ingredients: Meat and meat by-products (chicken, beef) and poultry by-products; wholegrain wheat; wholegrain barley and sorghum and corn; cereal by-products and vegetable proteins; minerals, vitamins and amino acids (including calcium, phosphorus, sodium, chloride, potassium, manganese, zinc, iron, copper, iodine, vitamin A, vitamin E, vitamin B1, vitamin B2, vitamin B3, vitamin B5, vitamin B6, vitamin B12, vitamin D, choline & folic acid); fish oil.

Made in NSW, Australia, this dog food is crafted from natural ingredients with added vitamins, minerals and nutrients. Pet owners can ensure their pal is getting healthy and enjoyable food with no added artificial colours, flavours or preservatives.

Every biscuit is filled with nourishing goodness that will benefit your pet, including their skin and coat. You can also mix it with wet or fresh food from Nature's Gift to keep everyday meals exciting for them.

description: PEDIGREE DENTASTIX SMALL DOG TREATS DAILY ORAL CARE DENTAL CHEWS 28 PACK
ingredients: Cereal,Humectant,Starch,Vegetable Gum,Minerals,Sodium Tripolyposphate,Meat And Meat By-Products (Pork),Vitamin E,Preservative,Zinc Sulphate,Flavours
long_description:
The PEDIGREE dry and wet main meal range has been designed to protect your dog in four ways: to help support a strong immune system, a healthy skin and coat, good digestion and healthy teeth or healthy bones. As the makers of PEDIGREE brand, everything we do is for the love of dogs. With over 40 years experience of developing PEDIGREE recipes which are developed with the nutritionists and veterinarians of the Waltham Petcare Science Institute.

PEDIGREE DENTASTIX Daily Oral Care chews have a unique X shape, special texture and two active ingredients that when fed daily, are scientifically proven to help reduce the build-up of tartar by up to 80%, clean hard to reach teeth and support gum health. Given 4 out of 5 dogs over the age of 3 have gum disease, caused by the build-up of plaque and tartar, you can help keep your dogs teeth and gums healthy and strong with a delicious and effective PEDIGREE DENTASTIX Daily Oral Care chew every day. PEDIGREE DENTASTIX Daily Oral Care chews contain two active ingredients, that bond with the calcium in saliva and slow down the build-up of tartar. This helps plaque stay softer for longer and makes it easier to remove by chewing PEDIGREE DENTASTIX Daily Oral Care chews.
  • REDUCES TARTAR BUILD-UP BY UP TO 80%: When fed daily.

  • UNIQUE X-SHAPE AND SPECIALLY DESIGNED ABRASIVE TEXTURE: Cleans hard to reach teeth & supports gum health

  • ACTIVE INGREDIENTS: Sodium Tripolyphosphate & Zinc Sulphate

  • NO ADDED ARTIFICIAL COLOURS OR FLAVOURS

  • NO ADDED SUGAR & LOW IN FAT

  • 51* CALORIES PER STICK *Based on typical composition.

long_description:
GREENIES Dental Treats have been developed by a team of experts from the Waltham Petcare Science Institute. Veterinarians, Nutritionists and Scientists have worked together to help develop our line of healthy treats, purposely designed for dog teeth. With a chewy and flexible texture that allows your dogs teeth to sink in right up to the gums without crumbling, for more effective plaque removal. For over a decade we have been dedicated to creating treats with proven health benefits. Utilising the most advanced science and understanding of pets' needs. We're in this business because we care about pets.

GREENIES Dental Care Treats for dogs are vet recommended for dental care with a unique texture that fights plaque and tartar. Made from highly digestible, balanced ingredients, fortified with added vitamins and minerals. We hit the spot with complete and balanced nutrition, one treat a day is all it takes for your dog to experience the amazing effect of CLEANER TEETH, FRESHER BREATH and TAIL WAGGING FLAVOUR.
  • CLEANS TEETH & MAINTAINS HEALTHY GUMS: With a unique chewy texture for a sparkle in every smile.

  • FIGHTS PLAQUE & TARTAR - WITH VETERINARY ORAL HEALTH COUNCIL (VOHC) ACCEPTANCE. When fed daily, scientifically proven to reduce build up.

  • FRESHENS BREATH: Makes mouths happy day after day

  • NATURAL INGREDIENTS: Plus Vitamins, Minerals & Nutrients

  • EASY TO DIGEST: Highly soluble ingredients

  • DELICIOUS & NUTRITIOUS: Balanced recipe for healthy treating.

  • COMPLETE & BALANCED NUTRITION: Formulated to meet the nutritional levels established by the AAFCO Dog Food Nutrient Profiles for adult dog maintenance..

  • VET RECOMMENDED: For dental care.

We understand that they're more than just pets. That is why we only use real cuts of meat - no carcasses or bones - only meat that you would feed any member of the family.

Our treats are slowly baked with love in a controlled environment to ensure all of the nourishing goodness is kept. Using simple honest ingredients with minimal processes allows us to give our best friend the best quality real meat treat. 

It's so tempting to over treat our best friend. That's why our stick treats are pawfect to control our urges.  The perforated marks make it easy to break and are a great way to control your calorific portion for your best friend whilst training.
  • Real meat as first ingredient
  • Single source of meat protein
  • At only 18 calories per treat, the breakable format is perfect for portion control
  • Ideal for those first training sessions with your puppy
Suitable for dogs of all ages.

description: PEDIGREE DENTASTIX MEDIUM DOG TREATS DAILY ORAL CARE DENTAL CHEWS 7 PACK
ingredients: Cereal; Humectant; Starch; Vegetable Gum; Minerals; Sodium Tripolyphosphate; Meat and Meat by-products (Pork); Vitamin E; Preservative; Zinc Sulphate; Flavours.
long_description:
The PEDIGREE dry and wet main meal range has been designed to protect your dog in four ways: to help support a strong immune system, a healthy skin and coat, good digestion and healthy teeth or healthy bones. As the makers of PEDIGREE brand, everything we do is for the love of dogs. With over 40 years experience of developing PEDIGREE recipes which are developed with the nutritionists and veterinarians of the Waltham Petcare Science Institute.

PEDIGREE DENTASTIX Daily Oral Care chews have a unique X shape, special texture and two active ingredients that when fed daily, are scientifically proven to help reduce the build-up of tartar by up to 80%, clean hard to reach teeth and support gum health. Given 4 out of 5 dogs over the age of 3 have gum disease, caused by the build-up of plaque and tartar, you can help keep your dogs teeth and gums healthy and strong with a delicious and effective PEDIGREE DENTASTIX Daily Oral Care chew every day. PEDIGREE DENTASTIX Daily Oral Care chews contain two active ingredients, that bond with the calcium in saliva and slow down the build-up of tartar. This helps plaque stay softer for longer and makes it easier to remove by chewing PEDIGREE DENTASTIX Daily Oral Care chews.
  • REDUCES TARTAR BUILD-UP BY UP TO 80%: When fed daily.

  • UNIQUE X-SHAPE AND SPECIALLY DESIGNED ABRASIVE TEXTURE: Cleans hard to reach teeth & supports gum health

  • ACTIVE INGREDIENTS: Sodium Tripolyphosphate & Zinc Sulphate

  • NO ADDED ARTIFICIAL COLOURS OR FLAVOURS

  • NO ADDED SUGAR & LOW IN FAT

  • 82* CALORIES PER STICK *Based on typical composition.
name: DentaStix Medium Dog Treats Daily Oral Care Dental Chews

description: GREENIES CANINE DENTAL DOG TREATS ORIGINAL PETITE 10 PACK 170G
ingredients: Wheat flour, glycerin, wheat gluten, gelatin, water, powdered cellulose, lecithin, minerals (dicalcium phosphate, potassium chloride, calcium carbonate, magnesium amino acid chelate, zinc amino acid chelate, iron amino acid chelate, copper amino acid chelate, manganese amino acid chelate, selenium, potassium iodide), natural poultry flavor, choline chloride, fruit juice color, vitamins (dl-alpha tocopherol acetate [source of vitamin E), vitamin B12 supplement, d-calcium pantothenate [vitamin B5], niacin supplement, vitamin A supplement, riboflavin supplement [vitamin B2), vitamin D3 supplement, biotin, thiamine mononitrate [vitamin B1], pyridoxine hydrochloride [vitamin B6), folic acid), turmeric color.
long_description:
GREENIES Dental Treats have been developed by a team of experts from the Waltham Petcare Science Institute. Veterinarians, Nutritionists and Scientists have worked together to help develop our line of healthy treats, purposely designed for dog teeth. With a chewy and flexible texture that allows your dogs teeth to sink in right up to the gums without crumbling, for more effective plaque removal. For over a decade we have been dedicated to creating treats with proven health benefits. Utilising the most advanced science and understanding of pets' needs. We're in this business because we care about pets.

GREENIES Dental Care Treats for dogs are vet recommended for dental care with a unique texture that fights plaque and tartar. Made from highly digestible, balanced ingredients, fortified with added vitamins and minerals. We hit the spot with complete and balanced nutrition, one treat a day is all it takes for your dog to experience the amazing effect of CLEANER TEETH, FRESHER BREATH and TAIL WAGGING FLAVOUR.
  • CLEANS TEETH & MAINTAINS HEALTHY GUMS: With a unique chewy texture for a sparkle in every smile.

  • FIGHTS PLAQUE & TARTAR - WITH VETERINARY ORAL HEALTH COUNCIL (VOHC) ACCEPTANCE. When fed daily, scientifically proven to reduce build up.

  • FRESHENS BREATH: Makes mouths happy day after day.

  • NATURAL INGREDIENTS: Plus Vitamins, Minerals & Nutrients

  • EASY TO DIGEST: Highly soluble ingredients

  • DELICIOUS & NUTRITIOUS: Balanced recipe for healthy treating.

  • COMPLETE & BALANCED NUTRITION: Formulated to meet the nutritional levels established by the AAFCO Dog Food Nutrient Profiles for adult dog maintenance..

  • VET RECOMMENDED: For dental care.
name: Canine Dental Dog Treats Original Petite 170g

Chicken Parsley & Carrot Baked Biscuits Dog Treats
description: SUPERCOAT CHICKEN PARSLEY & CARROT BAKED BISCUITS DOG TREATS 400 GRAM
long_description:
SUPERCOAT Baked Biscuits with Chicken, Carrot & Parsley are oven-baked and packed with wholesome goodness and real ingredients. With no artificial flavors and a delicious crunchy texture, these biscuits are the perfect reward for your dog.

Every dog deserves a treat that is both tasty and nourishing, and that's exactly what SUPERCOAT delivers with this carefully crafted recipe. These biscuits combine the savory flavor of real chicken with the natural sweetness of carrot and the fresh, aromatic notes of parsley. The result is a treat that excites your dog's taste buds while giving you peace of mind about the quality of ingredients.

The oven-baked process is key to what makes these biscuits so special. Baking locks in flavor and creates a satisfying crunch that dogs love. This crunchy texture not only makes each bite enjoyable but also helps keep your dog engaged, making these biscuits ideal for training, rewarding good behavior, or simply sharing a moment of joy together.

SUPERCOAT understands that pet owners want transparency and trust when it comes to their dog's diet. That's why these biscuits are made with wholesome natural ingredients and contain no artificial flavors. You can see the real components-chicken, carrot, and parsley-working together to create a snack that feels indulgent but is rooted in quality.

Carrots provide a natural source of vitamins and fiber, supporting healthy digestion and overall wellbeing. Parsley adds a refreshing herbal note while offering antioxidants that contribute to vitality. Combined with the protein-rich goodness of chicken, these biscuits strike a balance between taste and nutrition.

Each biscuit is thoughtfully portioned, averaging around 25 Kcal per piece, making them a manageable indulgence that fits easily into your dog's daily routine. Whether you're rewarding your dog after a walk, using them during training sessions, or simply spoiling them with a mid-day snack, you can feel confident knowing you're not overdoing it.

SUPERCOAT baked biscuits come in a convenient 400g pack, ensuring you have plenty of treats to share while keeping them fresh and crunchy. The pack size is perfect for households with one dog or several, giving you flexibility and value.

Because your dog's wellbeing is always the priority, remember to be sure your dog always has fresh water available when enjoying these biscuits. Hydration is an essential part of a healthy lifestyle, and pairing these crunchy treats with access to clean water ensures your pet stays happy, nourished, and energized.

These biscuits aren't just food - they're a way to celebrate the bond you share with your dog. Every time you offer one, you're reinforcing trust, love, and companionship. With their oven-baked crunch, real ingredients, and wholesome goodness, SUPERCOAT Baked Biscuits with Chicken, Carrot & Parsley are more than just a snack-they're a symbol of care.

So, when you want to reward your dog with something delicious, natural, and made with integrity, reach for SUPERCOAT. Because every treat should be as special as the joy your dog brings into your life.

  • Natural Ingredients

  • Oven Baked

  • Made with Real Ingredients

  • No Artificial Flavours

  • 25KCal in every biscuit
ingredients: Wholegrain cereals and cereal products; chicken & beef products and fats (poultry meal 3%, beef fat that may contain sheep); natural flavours; parsley (2% dried parsley, equivalent to 10.8% parsley); salt; carrot (0.65% dried carrot, equivalent to 5.6% carrot).

Peanut Butter & Oats Baked Biscuits Dog Treats
description: SUPERCOAT PEANUT BUTTER & OATS BAKED BISCUITS DOG TREATS 400 GRAM
long_description:
Every dog deserves a treat that's as nourishing as it is delicious. That's why SUPERCOAT Baked Biscuits with Peanut Butter & Oats are crafted with care, using wholesome natural ingredients you can trust. These oven-baked crunchy treats are designed to bring joy to your dog's day while giving you peace of mind about what you're feeding them.

Made with real oats, each biscuit delivers hearty goodness in every bite. Oats are a natural source of fibre, helping support healthy digestion, while peanut butter adds a rich, nutty flavour that dogs simply can't resist. Together, they create a snack that's both satisfying and wholesome, perfect for rewarding good behaviour or simply showing your dog how much they mean to you.

At SUPERCOAT, quality matters. That's why these biscuits contain no artificial flavours-just real, recognizable ingredients baked to perfection. You'll see the difference in the texture, smell, and taste, and your dog will feel the difference too. Each biscuit is carefully oven-baked to lock in flavour and create that irresistible crunch dogs love.

For pet owners who care about balance, these treats are thoughtfully portioned. With 25 Kcal on average in every biscuit, they're a manageable indulgence that fits easily into your dog's daily routine. Whether you're using them as training rewards, occasional snacks, or a way to spoil your furry friend, you can feel confident knowing they're not overdoing it.

SUPERCOAT baked biscuits come in a convenient 400g pack, giving you plenty of treats to share while keeping them fresh and crunchy. The pack size makes them ideal for households with one dog or several, ensuring you always have a wholesome snack on hand.

Because your dog's wellbeing is always the priority, remember to be sure your dog always has fresh water available when enjoying these biscuits. Hydration is an important part of a healthy lifestyle, and pairing these crunchy treats with access to clean water ensures your pet stays happy and nourished.

These biscuits aren't just food-they're moments of connection. Every time you offer one, you're reinforcing the bond you share with your dog. The satisfying crunch, the natural flavours, and the wholesome ingredients all come together to create a treat that feels special, yet responsible.

So, when you're looking for a way to reward your dog with something tasty, crunchy, and made with care, reach for SUPERCOAT Baked Biscuits with Peanut Butter & Oats. With their oven-baked goodness, real oats, and natural flavour, they're more than just a snack-they're a celebration of the love and joy your dog brings into your life.

  • Natural Ingredients

  • Oven Baked

  • Made with Real Oats

  • No Artificial Flavours

  • 25KCal in every biscuit

description: TOTALCARE BRUSH FLEXI BRUSH & SHINE 1 PACK
long_description:
The PURINA TOTALCARE 2 in 1 Brush & Shine is an essential grooming tool designed to keep your pet's coat healthy and shiny. This innovative brush features dual-sided bristles, effectively combining two grooming tools into one convenient device. On one side, soft nylon bristles work to remove loose hair while stimulating your pet's natural oils, promoting a vibrant and healthy coat.


The other side of the brush is equipped with rubber pins, specifically designed to reduce tangles and prevent matting, making it ideal for pets with longer or thicker fur. The air-cushioned pad that houses the steel pins enhances your grooming technique by providing a gentle touch and reducing excessive brushing force, ensuring a comfortable grooming experience for both you and your pet.


Using the PURINA TOTALCARE 2 in 1 Brush & Shine is simple and effective. Start with the rubber pin side to brush against your pet's coat, loosening dead hair and skin. Once the hair becomes loose, brush with the coat to remove dirt and debris. Finally, finish by using the bristle side to smooth and polish the coat, leaving it looking sleek and shiny. Regular grooming with this brush not only helps prevent matting but also minimizes moulting, keeping your home cleaner and your pet looking their best.


Invest in the PURINA TOTALCARE 2 in 1 Brush & Shine to simplify your grooming routine while ensuring your furry friend enjoys a healthy, beautiful coat. This versatile grooming tool is perfect for pet owners who want to provide the best care for their beloved companions.

description: TOTAL CARE SHAMPOO FLEA CONTROL 350ML
long_description:
PURINA TOTALCARE Flea Control Shampoo for Dogs is a powerful medicated formula specifically designed to combat fleas (Ctenocephalides spp.) and assist in the control of Paralysis Tick (Ixodes holocylus). This effective shampoo contains Melaleuca alternifolia, a germicidal oil that penetrates the skin to soothe irritation and discomfort caused by skin issues. Additionally, it helps manage eczema while thoroughly cleaning and conditioning your dog's coat, leaving it soft and healthy.


To use, start by shaking the shampoo bottle well. Wet your dog's coat thoroughly and apply enough shampoo to create a rich lather, avoiding contact with the face, eyes, and ears. Allow the lather to sit for 5 minutes before rinsing it off thoroughly. You may repeat the process if necessary. If your dog experiences itching or soreness, it is advisable to seek veterinary advice. For best results, use a dog brush or comb after washing to remove tangles, knots, and loose hair.


Please note that PURINA TOTALCARE Flea Control Shampoo is not recommended for puppies under 12 weeks of age. Additionally, Ixodes holocylus ticks are not present in Western Australia.


Keep your furry friend comfortable and their coat looking its best with PURINA TOTALCARE Flea Control Shampoo for Dogs, a reliable solution for flea and tick control made in Australia.


Have a question? Why not contact the Purina PetCare Advice Team, free call on 1800 738 238
  • Kills Fleas

  • Aids in the control of Paralysis Tick

  • Assists in the control of Eczema

  • Cleans & conditions your dog's coat

  • Made in Australia
name: Shampoo Flea Control

long_description:
The PURINA TOTALCARE 2 in 1 Slicker & Detangling Rake is the ultimate grooming tool designed to keep your pet's coat healthy, shiny, and free from tangles and mats. This versatile brush is perfect for preparing your pet for bathing, ensuring a smooth grooming experience.


Featuring a slicker side with uniquely shaped pins, this brush enhances your grooming technique while reducing excessive brushing force. The design allows for a gentle yet effective approach, ensuring that only a soft stroking action is required to loosen tangles and mats, making it comfortable for your pet. The rake side is equipped with rotating pins that effortlessly work through knots and remove dead undercoat, promoting a cleaner and healthier coat.


Using the PURINA TOTALCARE 2 in 1 Slicker & Detangling Rake is simple. Begin grooming at your pet's back legs and the bottom of their back, working systematically forward in the direction of the coat. Repeat the process until the brush glides easily through the fur. If the slicker side pulls or causes irritation, switch to the rake side for a more gentle approach. Regular grooming with this tool not only helps prevent matting but also minimizes moulting, keeping your home cleaner and your pet looking their best.


The PURINA TOTALCARE 2 in 1 Slicker & Detangling Rake is a practical addition to your grooming routine, helping to maintain your pet's coat health and appearance. By using this tool regularly, you can ensure that your furry friend enjoys a comfortable grooming experience while effectively managing tangles and mats. This grooming tool is designed to support pet owners in providing quality care for their companions, making it easier to keep their coats looking clean and healthy.


Have a question? Why not contact the Purina PetCare Advice Team, free call on 1800 738 238

long_description:
PURINA TOTALCARE Medicated Shampoo for Dogs is specially formulated to provide relief for pets suffering from dermatoses, eczema, and dry skin. This medicated shampoo offers targeted support to soothe irritation and restore comfort. With its anti-bacterial and anti-fungal properties, it effectively alleviates itching, promoting overall skin health.


Using PURINA TOTALCARE is straightforward. Begin by shaking the bottle well before use. Thoroughly soak your dog's coat and work the lather deep into the skin, avoiding contact with the face, eyes, and ears. Allow the shampoo to sit for five to ten minutes to maximize its soothing effects, then rinse thoroughly and dry your pet. For optimal results, repeat the process as necessary to maintain a healthy coat and skin. If any itching or soreness occurs, it is advised to seek veterinary advice.


After washing, using a dog brush or comb can help remove tangles, knots, and loose hair, further enhancing your dog's grooming routine.


Please note that this product is not recommended for puppies under 12 weeks of age. Choose PURINA TOTALCARE Medicated Shampoo for Dogs to help your furry friend feel comfortable and healthy, ensuring their coat looks and feels its best.
Have a question? Why not contact the Purina PetCare Advice Team, free call on 1800 738 238
  • Anti-bacterial & Anti-fungal

  • Assists the relief of Dermatoses, Eczema and Dry Skin

  • Relief from itching

  • Made in Australia

description: TOTALCARE HEARTWORMER & ALLWORMER PROTECTION MEDIUM & LARGE DOGS TREATMENT 2 PACK
long_description:
PURINA TOTALCARE Heartwormer & Allwormer Protection for Medium & Large Dogs is a vital solution for pet owners committed to keeping their furry friends healthy and safe from harmful parasites. Specifically formulated for dogs over 5kg, this product provides comprehensive protection against a variety of intestinal worms and heartworm infections.


A feature of TOTALCARE is its ability to prevent heartworm infections. Heartworms are serious parasites that can lead to severe health issues. By incorporating TOTALCARE into your dog's routine, you reduce the risk of contracting this dangerous parasite, ensuring your furry friend stays healthy and active. In addition to heartworm prevention, TOTALCARE effectively treats and controls a variety of intestinal worms, including roundworms, hookworms, whipworms and tapeworms. This comprehensive approach ensures that your dog is protected from multiple types of parasites.


By addressing multiple types of parasites in one easy-to-administer treatment, PURINA TOTALCARE simplifies your pet care routine.


Designed for ease of use, this heartwormer and allwormer tablet can be dossed directly, or hidden in your dogs food. Monthly use helps maintain their overall well-being and comfort, giving you peace of mind as a responsible pet owner.


Invest in PURINA TOTALCARE Heartwormer & Allwormer Protection for Puppies & Small Dogs to prioritize your pet's health and happiness. With this essential product, you can confidently protect your beloved companion from dangerous parasites and support their healthy, active lifestyle.
Ensure you fully read all packaging and included leaflets for full instructions. For heartworm prevention: Administer orally once a month, preferably on the same date each month.

name: Ezy-dose Monthly Heartworm & Intestinal All Wormer Dog Treatment
description: EXELPET EZY-DOSE MONTHLY HEARTWORM & INTESTINAL ALL WORMER DOG TREATMENT 4PACK
long_description:
The EXELPET brand is a well-recognised and trusted pet health care brand that has been helping to protect Australian dogs and cats from parasites since 1972. Parasites such as fleas, intestinal worms and heartworm pose a challenge to most Australian pets. Your pet is an important part of your life and looking after their day to day health is a big priority. EXELPET products offer a comprehensive range of convenient and effective solutions designed to eliminate and prevent fleas, intestinal worms and heartworm.

Intestinal worms affect thousands of Australian pets every year. Untreated, intestinal worms present a significant health risk to you and your pet. The good news is that keeping your pets free from intestinal parasites is easy. EXELPET worming products provide broad spectrum and simple to use treatment from intestinal parasites for your pet. Intestinal worming is recommended at least 3 monthly in your adult pet. Pets fed or potentially able to access offal require intestinal worming every 6 weeks.

EXELPET EZY-DOSE Monthly Heartwormer & Intestinal All-Wormer for Dogs can be given to all dogs and puppies.
  • CONTROLS ALL 11 INTESTINAL WORMS

  • PREVENTION OF HEARTWORM INFECTION

  • TASTY CHEWS, ONE CHEW TREATS 10KG

  • 4 tasty chews

long_description:
TOTALCARE Heartwormer, Allwormer & Flea Control for Large Dogs is the ultimate solution for pet owners seeking comprehensive parasite protection in a convenient format. Specifically designed for medium dogs weighing between 25-40kg, this all-in-one, water resistant product comes in an easy-to-apply topical tube, making it simple for pet owners to administer effective treatment without hassle.


A standout feature of TOTALCARE is its ability to prevent heartworm infections. Heartworms are serious parasites that can lead to severe health issues. By incorporating TOTALCARE into your dog's routine, you reduce the risk of contracting this dangerous parasite, ensuring your furry friend stays healthy and active.


In addition to heartworm prevention, TOTALCARE effectively treats and controls a variety of intestinal worms, including roundworms, hookworms, and whipworms. This comprehensive approach ensures that your dog is protected from multiple types of parasites. Furthermore, TOTALCARE treats and prevents fleas, providing relief from discomfort and reducing the incidence of flea allergy dermatitis, a condition that can lead to skin irritation.


TOTALCARE also treats and controls common parasites such as sarcoptic mange, ear mites, and lice, making it a versatile solution for various parasite-related issues. With just one application lasting a month, pet owners can enjoy peace of mind knowing their dogs are protected.


Investing in TOTALCARE Heartwormer, Allwormer & Flea Control for Large Dogs means prioritizing your pet's health and well-being.
Use two tubes to read very large dogs over 40kg bodyweight. Ensure you fully read all packaging and included leaflets for full instructions. Treatment for heartworm should occur regularly at monthly intervals.

description: PURINA TOTAL CARE TASTY ALLWORMER SMALL DOG OR PUPPIES TREATMENT 1 PACK
ingredients: Each tablet contains: 112mg Oxibendazole, 25mg Praziquantel.
long_description:
The TOTAL CARE Allwormer for Small Dogs & Puppies is an effective treatment for Roundworms, Hookworms, Whipworms and Tapeworms, for up to 3 months. It is a single dose treatment to be administered directly into their mouth. If your dog does not readily accept, chew and swallow the tablet, it can be crushed up and placed in their meal. It's important to remember that dogs can be reinfested with worms from contact with other pets or their surroundings. Treatment should be repeated regularly, as directed. Dosage and Administration. To avoid overdosing and ensuring effective worm treatment, it is essential to accurately weigh your dog and dose accordingly. Dogs: 1 tablet/5kg bodyweight, Young Animals: Puppies - Treat according to weight at 2, 4, 8, and 12 weeks of age. emales: Breeding - Treat at mating, before whelping and then every 3 months. Other - Treat every 3 months. Males: Treat every 3 months.
  • For the treatment and control of Roundworm, Hookworm, Whipworm and Tapeworm including Hydatids in small dogs and puppies

  • Does not control Heartworm in dogs

description: PURINA TOTAL CARE FLEA TICK CONTROL PLUS SMALL DOG TREATMENT 1PK
ingredients: 100 g/L Fipronil, 90 g/L (S)-Methoprene
long_description:
PURINA TOTAL CARE Flea & Tick Control Plus for Small Dogs kills onset and re-infestations with newly acquired adult fleas for one month. It also prevents the development of flea eggs, larvae and pupae produced by adult fleas acquired for three months after treatment. It controls brown dog ticks for one month, and paralysis ticks for two weeks. It may be used for the treatment and control of Flea Allergy Dermatitis in dogs. It may be used as the only product for flea control as it kills all stages of fleas.

Units in pack: 1 x 0.67 mL Tube

Dosage: Once a month

Suitable for: Small dogs and puppies up to 10 kg in bodyweight

Not recommended for: Puppies less than 8 weeks old

  • Controls paralysis ticks for up to 2 weeks

  • Controls brown dog ticks and biting lice for up to 1 month

  • Fast acting and long lasting.

description: BACK 2 NATURE SMALL ANIMAL BEDDING & LITTER 10 LITRE
long_description: For the past 10 years, back-2-nature has been providing comfy and safe little homes for our smallest of pets through their Small Animal Bedding & Litter. Made from 99% recycled paper, back-2-nature's flatter and ridged pellets allow for moisture to be absorbed rather than sitting on top of regular bedding, leaving the most delicate of feet dryer and less prone to irritations from standing in wet materials. With a flatter surface area, back-2-nature offers a safer experience for little paws and ankle joints as the pellets don't roll around when hopped or scurried across.Sterile at point of manufacture Back-2-Nature is low in dust reducing the irritations that occur from hay and pine shavings.back-2-nature Small Animal Bedding and Litter can be composted once the waste is removed, but we recommend you check with your local council.     Suitable for rabbits, rodents, ferrets, birds and reptiles.
ingredients: Recycled newspaper

These tasty dried mealworms can also be fed to insect eating wild birds, and certain species of fish including koi carp. Made from the dried larvae of the Tenebrio molitor beetle, Peters Wormies are naturally rich in protein, fats, vitamins and minerals.

long_description: Premium, high fibre, low protein and low calcium hay ideal for pet guinea pigs and rabbitsGuinea pigs and rabbits need high levels of fibre in their diets for healthy digestion and to keep teeth trim. Peters Oaten Hay is an ideal food for guinea pigs and rabbits due to its high fibre, low protein and low calcium content. It's a full flavoured hay with a distinctive, nutty flavour and crunchy texture.Vital for good digestive healthPeters Oaten Hay is a source of long-strand fibre, which is vital to the digestive health of pet guinea pigs and rabbits. Eating it regularly provides essential roughage for healthy gut function.Promotes healthy teethRabbits' and guinea pigs' teeth grow quickly and continue to grow throughout their life. Eating hay regularly promotes chewing and gnawing activity that cleans and wears down your pet's constantly growing teeth.

Hang a Fruit Crunchy Bar on the side of the hutch to entice your pet to reach up and nibble it. Helps to keep your pet active and stimulated when confined to the enclosure. The wooden core is made from renewable forest timber and is safe to chew. Suitable for all breeds of adult rabbits, guinea pigs, mice and rats. Feed Peters Fruit Crunchy Bars as a supplement to your pets main diet.
ingredients: Wheat, Sorghum, Black sunflower seed, Crushed maize, Oats, Extruded cereal pieces, Dried banana chips, Sultanas and/or Raisins, Paw paw, Pineapple, Colours

allergens:
Contains Gluten, Lupin, Soy
May Contain Peanut
country_of_origin: Made in Australia from Australian and imported ingredients
description: COLES RABBIT & GUINEA PIG FOOD 2KG
ingredients: Grain mix may contain one or more of the following due to seasonal variations:INGREDIENTS: Pellets [Wheat, Barley, Wheat Bran, Wheat Pollard, Lucerne Meal, Soybean Meal, Calcium Carbonate, Bentonite, Salt, Lysine, Threonine, Molasses, Vitamins & Minerals (includes Vitamin C)]Oats, Barley, Chaff Blend [Barley, Wheat Chaff, Lucerne Chaff,Wheat Bran, Sunflower Seeds, Molasses, Sunflower Oil], Sorghum, Wheat, Lupins.
long_description: Coles Rabbit & Guinea Pig Food 2kg. Suitable for all aged and breeds of rabbit and guinea pig. Keep your furry friends well fed.
name: Rabbit And Guinea Pig Food
Alfalfa & Fruit Rabbit & Guinea Pig Food
description: PETERS ALFALFA N FRUIT RABBIT GUINEA PIG 2KG
long_description: Peters Alfalfa & Fruit is a delicious medley of crunchy grains and leafy lucerne tossed with crispy banana chips, juicy sultanas, jumbo raisins and a sprinkling of paw paw and pineapple pieces. A rabbit and guinea pig favourite! The tantalising array of flavours, textures and aromas in Tropical & Vine Fruits encourages the natural foraging behaviour of rabbits and guinea pigs. Your pet will love discovering tasty morsels to nibble at mealtime. And while your pet is nibbling and gnawing contentedly, the chewing action helps to keep teeth trim. Suitable for all breeds of adult rabbits and guinea pigs.
ingredients: Pellets (containing Wheaten bran and pollard, Lupins, Barley, Lucerne, Clover, Lignin, Canola, Triticale, Lentils, Oats, Peas, Beans, Soya, Sunflower, Grape and products derived from those ingredients, Bentonite, Limestone, Dicalcium phosphate, Salt, Vitamins and Minerals), Oats, Sorghum, Lucerne chaff, Black sunflower seed, Banana chips (3%), Sultanas (3%), Jumbo raisins (1%), Paw paw (0.5%), Pineapple (0.5%) and Vegetable oil

description: BIC J26 LOOSE LIGHTER CHILD RESISTANT
long_description:
The classic BIC Maxi pocket lighter is designed for frequent long-lasting use and meets or exceeds international safety standards. Child-resistant and calibrated for a controlled steady flame, it lights up to 3,000 times for exceptional reliability and value. Superior safety performance in extreme conditions. Choose from 8 cheerful colours.
  • Long-lasting. Up to 3,000 lights right in your pocket and that's up to twice as many as other flint lighters of the same size

  • Steady flame. This maxi lighter comes pre-set for a predictableflame at the same height during the entire expected life of the lighter

  • Highly resistant. This gas lighter can take it. The body made of Delrin resin offers superior safety performance in extreme conditions

  • Safety first! Every BIC lighter is made in BIC plants in France and Spain to meet or exceed international lighter safety standards

  • Standout colours: red, green, orange, yellow, black, dark blue, light blue, and grey
name: J26 Loose Lighter Child Resistant

description: BIC MINI LOOSE LIGHTER CHILD RESISTANT
long_description:
A little goes a long way. Up to 1,450 lights right in your pocket. Other flint lighters of comparable size only deliver half that many. The handy mini version of the iconic BIC lighter is calibrated to always light the same reliable flame and fit anywhere. Made of hardwearing Delrin resin, this gas lighter is designed for superior performance in extreme conditions. This child-resistant mini lighter is manufactured in BIC's specially engineered plants in France and Spain and is available in a huge range of classic BIC colours, pretty pastels, and flashy fluorescents to match your every look
  • A little goes a long way. Up to 1,450 lights right in your pocket. Other flint lighters of comparable size only deliver half that many

  • Ready, steady, go. The handy mini version of the iconic BIC lighter calibrated to always light the same reliable flame and fit anywhere

  • Cute and mighty. Made of hardwearing Delrin resin, this gas lighter is designed for superior performance in extreme conditions

  • European made. This child-resistant mini lighter is manufactured in BIC's specially engineered plants in France and Spain

  • Stylin' shades. Available in a huge range of classic BIC colours, pretty pastels, and flashy fluorescents to match your every look
name: Mini Loose Lighter Child Resistant

description: J38 EZ REACH LIGHTER
long_description:
Whether you're lighting candles for a special occasion, grilling at home or getting ready to warm up by the fireplace, BIC EZ Reach is there to light the way. The 3.5cm wand allows you to light hard to reach places & keep fingers away from the flame. BIC EZ Reach is the essential tool for safe and convenient indoor and outdoor lighting needs. Our high-performing, long-lasting lighters feature a one-click ignition system which produces a reliable flame every time you use it. BIC EZ Reach is available in a range of colours to match your style and mood. While no lighter can be 100% child-proof, rest assured this one is child-resistant, which means that more than 85% of children under 51 months cannot operate it.
  • The Ultimate Lighter for all your lighting needs. Perfect for lighting candles, stoves, BBQ's, grills, gas cookers and more

  • Features a 3.5 cm wand to light hard to reach places and helps keep fingers away from the flame

  • This convenient multi-purpose lighter holds up to 900 lights and ignites at the same height every time, so just press, light, repeat

  • BIC lighters are made of highly durable Delrin resin for heightened safety in extreme conditions

  • Made in Spain in BIC's own plants with decades of time-honoured knowledge

  • Please note, colours may vary.
name: Ez Reach Lighter
